title: arachniodes × tomitae
intro: Arachniodes × tomitae, also known as the Tohno fern or a hybrid of the autumn fern and the Japanese autumn fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Japan, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Arachniodes × tomitae include reducing pain and swelling, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Arachniodes × tomitae is often prepared for medicinal use in teas, infusions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal preparation methods.
